client_updates.highlight: Lighthouse: Gloas partial column support nearly complete; pending review
Lighthouse plans to enable partial columns on Hoodi by default (mainnet off); release targeting June
discv5: Besu lacks parallel stack support; Nethermind has it disabled on mainnet; Reth uses wrong port

networking_research.highlight: Raúl presented batched/pre-aggregating attestations at source proposal (EIP PR #11589) targeting Hegota
Key mechanism: two-way seal binding prevents permutation attacks; eliminates need for new slashing conditions
Worst-case spam bounded: each validator can act as batcher only once per committee per slot
Post-quantum concern raised: BLS-specific benefits may not carry over; physical consolidation still needed long-term

blob_pool.highlight: GetBlobs V3 latency root cause suspected: MMAP/disk-paged values in Billy store (Geth); CPU profile needed to confirm
Sparse blob pool: bitmap endianness ambiguity caused Nethermind and P2P implementation bugs; spec clarification PR merged

action_items.action: Run CPU profile on Geth node during devnet load test to diagnose GetBlobs latency
Review batched attestations EIP PR #11589; cryptographers specifically requested to evaluate

decisions.decision: Lighthouse will enable partial columns on Hoodi by default while keeping it disabled on mainnet

targets.target: June 2026 — Lighthouse partial columns release targeting Hoodi deployment
